title: Hosta Care and Cultivation
description: Everything I have saved about growing hostas well. Pruning, dividing, slug control, cultivar guides, and shade siting from the American Hosta Society and Fine Gardening.

title: Shade Garden Design Ideas
description: Videos on designing and layering shade borders. Covers canopy, understory, perennials, and groundcovers for Connecticut zone 6.

title: Connecticut Native Plants
description: Native ferns, wildflowers, and woodland plants suited to Connecticut. From the CT Native Plant Society and local garden experts.

title: Gardeners World - Monty Don
description: Favourite episodes from Gardeners World. Monty Don at Longmeadow, shade planting, composting, and wildlife gardening.

title: National Trust Garden Visits
description: Hidcote, Sissinghurst, Stourhead, and other National Trust gardens in autumn and winter. Design ideas for a New England context.

title: Perennial Border - Echinacea and Rudbeckia
description: Videos on growing coneflowers, black-eyed Susans, and mixed perennial borders. Deadheading, naturalization, and wildlife value.

title: Seasonal Garden Tasks - Zone 6 CT
description: Month by month guides for shade gardens in Connecticut. Hosta care timing, fall cleanup, spring planning, and winter prep.

title: Quick Gardening Tips - Shorts
description: Short-form gardening tips under a minute. Quick answers to common questions about hostas, ferns, and shade planting.

title: Soil and Garden Prep
description: Amending heavy clay, composting for shade borders, and preparing new beds under trees. Practical guides for a Connecticut garden.

title: Garden Club and Plant Society Resources
description: Videos about plant societies, garden clubs, seed exchanges, and local gardening communities in the Northeast.
